item.title: Why is Saianand Commercial Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of the latest available data, Saianand Commercial Ltd’s stock price remains unchanged at ₹0.24, reflecting a neutral movement on the day. However, a deeper examination of its performance over various time frames reveals a complex picture of volatility and underperformance relative to the broader market benchmarks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is SIS Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-May, SIS Ltd’s stock price declined by 2.92% to close at ₹373.70, continuing a three-day losing streak that has seen the share price fall by 7.04%. This short-term weakness contrasts with the company’s robust financial performance and positive longer-term returns. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Prism Johnson Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12 May, Prism Johnson Ltd’s stock price declined by 2.18% to ₹125.50, continuing a downward trend influenced by weak financial metrics, sectoral headwinds, and persistent underperformance relative to market benchmarks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Steel Authority Of India Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: As of 12 May, Steel Authority Of India Ltd. (SAIL) experienced a notable decline in its share price, falling by 2.55% to ₹176.00. This drop comes after a three-day losing streak, reflecting short-term market pressures despite the company’s robust long-term returns and solid fundamentals. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-May, The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd. witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 5.0% to close at ₹130.05. This drop comes after two consecutive days of losses, reflecting short-term selling pressure despite the bank's strong long-term fundamentals and market-beating returns. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Premco Global Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-May, Premco Global Ltd witnessed a sharp decline in its share price, falling by 14.42% to close at ₹396.55. This significant drop reflects a combination of technical weaknesses and broader sectoral pressures, resulting in the stock underperforming both its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Precision Wires India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-May, Precision Wires India Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 5.42% to close at ₹389.00. This drop comes after a period of strong long-term gains and robust financial performance, indicating a short-term correction rather than a fundamental weakness. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is PTC India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-May, PTC India Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 5.29% to close at ₹202.15. This drop comes after three consecutive days of losses, reflecting short-term selling pressures despite the company’s robust long-term fundamentals and market-beating returns. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Wipro Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-May, Wipro Ltd. witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹189.55, down ₹7.05 or 3.59%. This drop reflects a continuation of the stock’s underperformance relative to both its sector and benchmark indices, driven by a combination of weak long-term growth metrics and subdued investor participation. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Nirlon Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-May, Nirlon Ltd's stock price rose by 1.8% to ₹595.10, reflecting robust financial performance and sustained investor interest amid a broader sector decline. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Zuari Industries Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12 May, Zuari Industries Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 3.29% to close at ₹257.40. This drop reflects a continuation of recent downward momentum, influenced by both sectoral trends and diminished investor engagement. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Gowra Leasing & Finance Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12 May, Gowra Leasing & Finance Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹78.22, down ₹2.68 or 3.31% from the previous close. This drop reflects a combination of sector-wide pressures, technical weaknesses, and subdued investor participation. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is CESC Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 12-May, CESC Ltd’s stock price declined by 0.8% to close at ₹180.55, continuing a three-day losing streak despite its strong longer-term performance and attractive valuation metrics. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: When is the next results date for Sedemac Mechatronics Ltd?
item.description: The next results date for Sedemac Mechatronics Ltd is 18 May 2026. Time: May 12 2026 11:18 PM IST
